headline: Forget ARKK: This Buffett-Style ETF Beat It Over 5 Years With Half the Volatility
summary: Investors buy the ARK Innovation ETF (NYSEARCA:ARKK) when they want concentrated exposure to disruptive innovation: electric vehicles, genomics, fintech, autonomy, and AI. Cathie Wood’s flagship has headlined the active-growth category for a decade, and it still commands a loyal base. The case for owning it holds. The case for owning something else alongside it, or instead, sharpens ... Forget ARKK: This Buffett-Style ETF Beat It Over 5 Years With Half the Volatility

headline: Marvell Taps Adobe CFO as AI Growth Push Continues
summary: Marvell names Dan Durn CFO and reiterates second-quarter outlook.

headline: CFOs On the Move: Week ending June 12
summary: Marvell Technology hires Adobe’s finance chief, Geico and Dentsply Sirona name new CFOs and the Los Angeles Lakers promote an insider to the top finance spot.
